N:=76;

	+ 3*x*(165*x^58 + 990*x^57 + 4015*x^56 + 11708*x^55 + 32691*x^54 - 731204*x^53 + 503336*x^52 + 5848092*x^51 - 2266376*x^50 - 27375820*x^49 - 16480612*x^48 + 65047240*x^47 + 111464116*x^46 - 10222614*x^45 - 228789491*x^44 - 243404916*x^43 + 54288062*x^42 - 175938560*x^41 + 2425716514*x^40 + 1201172228*x^39 - 7264074133*x^38 + 893141196*x^37 + 8515720548*x^36 - 5316203692*x^35 - 12259588204*x^34 + 4983556370*x^33 + 13503598817*x^32 + 3050639040*x^31 - 9383681164*x^30 - 5208615788*x^29 + 843409006*x^28 + 8856803320*x^27 + 2272993355*x^26 + 9271777796*x^25 - 3636573028*x^24 + 20349083688*x^23 - 9216711531*x^22 + 20812660908*x^21 + 1464390546*x^20 + 3615850800*x^19 + 3614535778*x^18 + 1040911742*x^17 + 960120941*x^16 - 63276048*x^15 + 471509260*x^14 - 108804998*x^13 + 304682621*x^12 - 90761964*x^11 + 172845890*x^10 - 62965914*x^9 + 83848251*x^8 - 33441632*x^7 + 32619713*x^6 - 12429564*x^5 + 8807666*x^4 - 2616504*x^3 + 1281018*x^2 - 213180*x + 67830)*y^14
	- x*(220*x^57 + 1540*x^56 + 7370*x^55 + 26261*x^54 + 82933*x^53 - 1714820*x^52 + 1406839*x^51 + 12615016*x^50 - 182024*x^49 - 49083168*x^48 - 51842214*x^47 + 68404871*x^46 + 198336705*x^45 + 111072832*x^44 - 223641082*x^43 - 501817512*x^42 - 446116500*x^41 - 973790744*x^40 + 4586139778*x^39 + 2289185929*x^38 - 10271393336*x^37 + 4644730916*x^36 + 13712095763*x^35 - 8106126963*x^34 - 19587145526*x^33 + 2788896802*x^32 + 15469334645*x^31 + 7163075142*x^30 - 9917958886*x^29 - 9012918912*x^28 - 8661728975*x^27 + 587765595*x^26 - 11059604042*x^25 - 1836631814*x^24 - 22474853885*x^23 + 7766885125*x^22 - 29429103050*x^21 + 13320550976*x^20 - 9810135682*x^19 - 542087101*x^18 - 82798666*x^17 - 675957130*x^16 - 271999631*x^15 - 698262161*x^14 - 190393143*x^13 - 424779640*x^12 - 66198699*x^11 - 220091371*x^10 - 7593534*x^9 - 98964582*x^8 + 8458297*x^7 - 36932575*x^6 + 6554444*x^5 - 10423176*x^4 + 2084676*x^3 - 1767456*x^2 + 232560*x - 116280)*y^13
	+ x*(66*x^56 + 528*x^55 + 2856*x^54 + 11644*x^53 + 40791*x^52 - 1179478*x^51 + 869368*x^50 + 7488720*x^49 + 3280538*x^48 - 22164956*x^47 - 34697718*x^46 + 7779280*x^45 + 87218886*x^44 + 107394564*x^43 + 7424640*x^42 - 187101352*x^41 - 379412922*x^40 - 891501640*x^39 + 2062307869*x^38 + 441282228*x^37 - 4888465901*x^36 + 3190042906*x^35 + 6834110775*x^34 - 2459715304*x^33 - 8055969585*x^32 - 26266926*x^31 + 5335420532*x^30 + 5091446440*x^29 - 17127231*x^28 + 1217402434*x^27 + 924923825*x^26 + 6115877292*x^25 + 2144153557*x^24 + 6808285822*x^23 - 2329909473*x^22 + 7764426200*x^21 - 7821677962*x^20 + 7185258996*x^19 - 2718926887*x^18 + 1086556208*x^17 + 507430023*x^16 + 454640098*x^15 + 408133538*x^14 + 232244064*x^13 + 227603301*x^12 + 110812090*x^11 + 110794575*x^10 + 42046516*x^9 + 45095075*x^8 + 11223378*x^7 + 15019861*x^6 + 1554880*x^5 + 3926796*x^4 - 97512*x^3 + 697680*x^2 - 46512*x + 54264)*y^12
	- 3*x*(4*x^55 + 36*x^54 + 215*x^53 + 972*x^52 + 3717*x^51 - 232650*x^50 + 110506*x^49 + 1172138*x^48 + 1078110*x^47 - 2422948*x^46 - 5664098*x^45 - 3136102*x^44 + 7961846*x^43 + 18345754*x^42 + 19211948*x^41 - 541392*x^40 - 38723542*x^39 - 141008511*x^38 + 291383313*x^37 - 65717906*x^36 - 758324369*x^35 + 444898847*x^34 + 903708541*x^33 - 188893657*x^32 - 1003874441*x^31 - 309605825*x^30 + 125502859*x^29 + 181778884*x^28 - 478195195*x^27 - 441228692*x^26 - 700567913*x^25 - 46953094*x^24 - 423282619*x^23 + 365789484*x^22 - 547143358*x^21 + 654918213*x^20 - 1019024012*x^19 + 615504664*x^18 - 486946969*x^17 - 22085789*x^16 - 104625923*x^15 - 66442477*x^14 - 50964283*x^13 - 40535829*x^12 - 25635859*x^11 - 19055092*x^10 - 10287099*x^9 - 7189989*x^8 - 3131791*x^7 - 2142335*x^6 - 661552*x^5 - 489838*x^4 - 77724*x^3 - 80427*x^2 - 1938*x - 6783)*y^11
	+ x*(x^54 + 10*x^53 + 65*x^52 + 320*x^51 + 1320*x^50 - 341352*x^49 + 53856*x^48 + 1280400*x^47 + 1920270*x^46 - 1361360*x^45 - 6034408*x^44 - 8181648*x^43 - 381430*x^42 + 12441192*x^41 + 26846078*x^40 + 22618148*x^39 - 7176126*x^38 - 122331078*x^37 + 393750701*x^36 - 156994212*x^35 - 881319628*x^34 + 466054224*x^33 + 977476934*x^32 + 127625268*x^31 - 597462658*x^30 + 9129918*x^29 + 419136893*x^28 + 711506272*x^27 + 185854005*x^26 + 198536486*x^25 - 276507937*x^24 + 206634172*x^23 - 240540230*x^22 + 529409714*x^21 - 242865787*x^20 + 836841276*x^19 - 559459515*x^18 + 803480332*x^17 - 158579192*x^16 + 206938648*x^15 + 79290108*x^14 + 79932060*x^13 + 56167568*x^12 + 38054648*x^11 + 25628839*x^10 + 15090028*x^9 + 9170020*x^8 + 4591012*x^7 + 2517203*x^6 + 1006100*x^5 + 511686*x^4 + 140520*x^3 + 73017*x^2 + 8550*x + 5985)*y^10
	+ x*(134596*x^48 + 21252*x^47 - 350658*x^46 - 831358*x^45 - 197248*x^44 + 1172094*x^43 + 3156226*x^42 + 2956379*x^41 + 1175970*x^40 - 3776642*x^39 - 5515983*x^38 - 1460007*x^37 + 29774826*x^36 - 154271290*x^35 + 73576818*x^34 + 306466852*x^33 - 84791650*x^32 - 208595193*x^31 + 6790177*x^30 + 231477239*x^29 + 111848142*x^28 + 22771632*x^27 - 113864806*x^26 - 18178440*x^25 - 51460984*x^24 + 106188968*x^23 + 7991445*x^22 + 166946683*x^21 - 18052786*x^20 + 186038562*x^19 - 82213753*x^18 + 242871809*x^17 - 95181612*x^16 + 118348133*x^15 + 16926276*x^14 + 33829146*x^13 + 19882364*x^12 + 14117805*x^11 + 9054837*x^10 + 5385231*x^9 + 3079226*x^8 + 1577628*x^7 + 790253*x^6 + 336881*x^5 + 147126*x^4 + 47751*x^3 + 18468*x^2 + 3420*x + 1330)*y^9
	- 3*x*(14168*x^47 + 7084*x^46 - 20240*x^45 - 85974*x^44 - 82628*x^43 - 28271*x^42 + 169716*x^41 + 295092*x^40 + 414272*x^39 + 204916*x^38 + 91988*x^37 + 67312*x^36 + 1859204*x^35 - 18237406*x^34 + 5240684*x^33 + 24055419*x^32 - 9756446*x^31 - 19843486*x^30 - 5647716*x^29 + 14063826*x^28 + 9521704*x^27 + 6322058*x^26 - 6915696*x^25 - 3877636*x^24 - 11837592*x^23 - 2409946*x^22 - 11665640*x^21 + 43748*x^20 - 13585992*x^19 + 1487202*x^18 - 16196448*x^17 + 6753635*x^16 - 14586274*x^15 + 947502*x^14 - 4044020*x^13 - 1592185*x^12 - 1297398*x^11 - 774634*x^10 - 452244*x^9 - 247438*x^8 - 124852*x^7 - 59540*x^6 - 25484*x^5 - 10369*x^4 - 3526*x^3 - 1184*x^2 - 260*x - 70)*y^8
	+ x*(10626*x^46 + 9614*x^45 - 46*x^44 - 49754*x^43 - 80175*x^42 - 111336*x^41 - 34498*x^40 + 56942*x^39 + 279606*x^38 + 421788*x^37 + 726586*x^36 + 1047188*x^35 + 2262717*x^34 - 13558029*x^33 + 5064145*x^32 + 16348465*x^31 - 6000616*x^30 - 13421002*x^29 - 7920204*x^28 + 4301670*x^27 + 4945202*x^26 + 7450088*x^25 + 1888961*x^24 + 4901568*x^23 + 384336*x^22 + 6305388*x^21 + 1374580*x^20 + 8331964*x^19 + 892548*x^18 + 8563525*x^17 - 1269282*x^16 + 9213413*x^15 - 2695098*x^14 + 3715607*x^13 + 450758*x^12 + 773619*x^11 + 372789*x^10 + 215648*x^9 + 112613*x^8 + 55258*x^7 + 25466*x^6 + 10759*x^5 + 4214*x^4 + 1439*x^3 + 447*x^2 + 102*x + 21)*y^7
	- x*(2024*x^45 + 2760*x^44 + 3456*x^43 - 3615*x^42 - 11204*x^41 - 27132*x^40 - 31500*x^39 - 35298*x^38 - 5856*x^37 + 34750*x^36 + 138868*x^35 + 283236*x^34 + 587936*x^33 - 2733158*x^32 + 1528908*x^31 + 3562434*x^30 - 322688*x^29 - 1879302*x^28 - 1790844*x^27 - 251650*x^26 - 235866*x^25 + 298983*x^24 - 657024*x^23 - 338748*x^22 - 1331328*x^21 - 601136*x^20 - 1456728*x^19 - 356551*x^18 - 1291774*x^17 + 50325*x^16 - 1057064*x^15 + 609769*x^14 - 821346*x^13 + 164683*x^12 - 121716*x^11 - 20283*x^10 - 16730*x^9 - 8007*x^8 - 3816*x^7 - 1715*x^6 - 714*x^5 - 273*x^4 - 92*x^3 - 27*x^2 - 6*x - 1)*y^6
	+ 3*x^10*(92*x^35 + 172*x^34 + 345*x^33 + 267*x^32 + 150*x^31 - 543*x^30 - 1200*x^29 - 2420*x^28 - 2828*x^27 - 2965*x^26 - 226*x^25 + 5242*x^24 + 18360*x^23 - 178542*x^22 + 82800*x^21 + 189234*x^20 + 26740*x^19 - 38830*x^18 - 51687*x^17 + 11768*x^16 + 24614*x^15 + 70940*x^14 + 48784*x^13 + 73159*x^12 + 31260*x^11 + 53257*x^10 + 5690*x^9 + 35000*x^8 - 14004*x^7 + 26683*x^6 - 21248*x^5 + 33230*x^4 - 22776*x^3 + 8220*x^2 - 1650*x + 165)*y^5
	- x^10*(24*x^34 + 58*x^33 + 148*x^32 + 233*x^31 + 378*x^30 + 448*x^29 + 548*x^28 + 473*x^27 + 438*x^26 + 228*x^25 + 312*x^24 + 606*x^23 + 2076*x^22 - 86374*x^21 + 21136*x^20 + 53826*x^19 + 2276*x^18 - 23097*x^17 - 38824*x^16 - 28718*x^15 - 28388*x^14 - 12405*x^13 - 13652*x^12 - 117*x^11 - 6062*x^10 + 4898*x^9 - 4672*x^8 + 5565*x^7 - 5662*x^6 + 6054*x^5 - 5176*x^4 + 8532*x^3 - 5480*x^2 + 1595*x - 220)*y^4
	+ x^10*(x^33 + 3*x^32 + 9*x^31 + 19*x^30 + 39*x^29 + 69*x^28 + 119*x^27 + 189*x^26 + 294*x^25 + 434*x^24 + 630*x^23 + 882*x^22 + 1218*x^21 - 8242*x^20 + 3738*x^19 + 6858*x^18 + 3706*x^17 + 2040*x^16 + 396*x^15 + 416*x^14 - 237*x^13 + 359*x^12 - 118*x^11 + 525*x^10 - 76*x^9 + 499*x^8 - 213*x^7 + 391*x^6 - 308*x^5 + 432*x^4 - 221*x^3 + 570*x^2 - 297*x + 66)*y^3
	+ 3*x^10*(260*x^19 - 40*x^18 - 94*x^17 - 52*x^16 - 28*x^15 + 4*x^14 + 14*x^13 + 34*x^12 + 33*x^11 + 44*x^10 + 35*x^9 + 40*x^8 + 26*x^7 + 28*x^6 + 12*x^5 + 14*x^4 - x^3 + 4*x^2 - 7*x + 4)*y^2
	- x^10*(40*x^18 - 4*x^17 - 9*x^16 - 8*x^15 - 8*x^14 - 7*x^13 - 7*x^12 - 6*x^11 - 6*x^10 - 5*x^9 - 5*x^8 - 4*x^7 - 4*x^6 - 3*x^5 - 3*x^4 - 2*x^3 - 2*x^2 - x - 1)*y
	+ x^27;
q := (x*y - x - y - 1)/(x*y + x + y + 1);
t :=(-x*y + x + y + 1)/(x*y + x - y - 1);
E:=[1,(q^2-1)*(t^2-1)/16,(q^2-1)*(t^2-1)/16,0,0];
P:=[(q+1)*(t^2-1)/8,(q+1)^2*(t-1)^2*(t+1)/32];
